channel.title: php on Jonathan Ma
channel.description: Recent content in php on Jonathan Ma

item.title: Project - Membership Site
item.description: Duration Elapsed (3 months - ongoing) Problem A complete redesign of the current Membership Site. From visual to content creation. GRAV vs Wordpress Inital decision to drop Wordpress and use GRAV as development framework. Since it is faster and has a smoother interface. I managed to convince the team to use it because of a lower learning curve and ability to edit with an Admin Panel. Log 28-30 June Side-tracked to build a landing page for a campaign within the site.
